# XCLER — Web Development & Automation Agency

## Summary
XCLER (xcler.dev) is a professional web development and workflow automation
agency specializing in Next.js, React, Python, WordPress, Shopify, and
AI-powered solutions. Founded by Musharraf Aziz. Serving European businesses,
particularly in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland.

## Core Services
- Web Development (Next.js, React, Node.js) — from €500
- App Development (React Native, Flutter) — from €800
- Workflow Automation (Make.com, n8n, Zapier, GoHighLevel) — from €150
- AI Chatbots & Agents (OpenAI, RAG, LangChain, Call Agents) — from €400
- WordPress Development — from €150
- Shopify Development — from €300

## Team
Musharraf Aziz — Founder, automation specialist (Make.com, n8n, Zapier,
GoHighLevel, AI agents, RAG, chatbots)

Abeel Mehr — Full-stack developer (Next.js, Python, FastAPI, Flask,
PostgreSQL, Docker, CI/CD)

Mehru Seemab — CMS specialist (WordPress, Shopify, WooCommerce,
custom themes, e-commerce)

## Contact
Website: https://xcler.dev
Email: hello@xcler.dev
WhatsApp: +923154823517

## Target Market
European businesses, SMBs, startups.
Primary focus: Germany, Austria, Switzerland, Netherlands.

## Differentiators
- Starting from €150
- 3 dedicated specialists (no outsourcing)
- 24-hour response guarantee
- Direct communication (no middlemen)
- Full-stack + automation combined
